name: axon-lang
description: Axon — AI-native programming language that transpiles to JavaScript

scripts.build-demo: node dist/cli.js examples/controls.axn demo/controls.axon.js && node tools/embed_sources.js
scripts.build-music: node dist/cli.js examples/music.axn demo/music.axon.js && node tools/embed_music.js
scripts.build-combat: node dist/cli.js examples/combat.axn demo/combat.axon.js && node tools/embed_combat.js
scripts.build-rpg: node dist/cli.js examples/rpg.axn demo/rpg.axon.js && node tools/embed_rpg.js
scripts.build-rpg-standalone: node dist/cli.js examples/rpg.axn demo/rpg.axon.js && node tools/embed_rpg.js && node tools/build_standalone_rpg.js
scripts.test: node dist/cli.js --test examples/rpg.axn && node dist/cli.js --test examples/v04_features.axn && node dist/cli.js --test examples/v095_features.axn
